description_long: This bungalow consists of two adjacent single-story residential units, each with a low-pitched, corrugated gable roof. The exterior walls are a mix of muted pink and tan panels, with geometric patterns adding visual interest to the facade. Each unit features a small, covered porch area and a blue vehicle parked in front, suggesting driveways or carports. The windows are rectangular and symmetrically placed, with blue frames that contrast against the wall colors. The property is set on a rectangular lot with alternating green and black stripes, possibly representing grass and pavement. The overall design is simple and functional, with a modern, utilitarian aesthetic.
description: A pair of single-story bungalows with gable roofs, geometric wall patterns, and blue-framed windows, set on a striped rectangular lot with carports and porches.
description_view_0: Front view showing both bungalows side by side, with visible porches, blue vehicles, and geometric wall patterns.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the lot, the gable roofs, and the arrangement of windows and doors along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrances, carports, and the continuation of the geometric wall patterns.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the lot's length, the rear of the vehicles, and the symmetry of the rooflines.
